property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-26\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Juanita\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\maven\bin;c:\Users\Juanita\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5\bundled\scripts\noConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: runScenario["User authentication with valid credentials", "Optional[Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API]"](1)

testcase.name: runScenario["User authentication with invalid credentials", "Optional[Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API]"](2)
testcase.system-out:
@Login @api @negative @regression @authReg2 Scenario Outline: User authentication with invalid credentials # src/test/resources/features/login.feature:34 {password=wrongpassword, username=admin} Request method: POST Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/auth/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "wrongpassword", "username": "admin" } HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 17:20:30 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: oSOAeA5ZSfWPYGP5DcO5xA x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880038-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880038-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=rIVW5Gs%2BaOTV62G8Qs27OviTeS9OX98PPtX5OREKeLrzHvzZ33rXzvOfPVUEjNcW7dUDdhJHqCcHF3ksVlW%2F7KFYV4jNXIwBFu9owoa5pVp3ydHGGr%2B2zo5nrhDguGvuWaOOHo7cKnRhJCjFoA%3D%3D"}]} CF-RAY: 9e384e4d4fd081fe-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "error": "Invalid credentials" } When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "wrongpassword" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.user_authenticates_as_user(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then API response status code should be 401 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.API_response_status_code_should_be(int) And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.Response_should_indicate(java.lang.String) And Response should not contain authentication token # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.Response_should_not_contain_authentication_token()

testcase.system-out:
@Login @api @negative @regression @authReg2 Scenario Outline: User authentication with invalid credentials # src/test/resources/features/login.feature:39 {password=password, username=admin' OR '1'='1} Request method: POST Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/auth/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "password", "username": "admin' OR '1'='1" } HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 17:20:33 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: Re3T9tjfSfmfWjlnipRofQ x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880090-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880090-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=qYIGDz3cyQPj5fmCS6Bo1%2BKjlMpUYgQ94CzGX67vbjuC26g2t7ZmHF1w4T14IogZ77J7qNZwAweEf%2Fpy6vJKYhb1KgbzLPedPfsLYX6%2BJ1sdAz9by%2FO1ki6%2B8ppToH4OoBqIH3ofDdtEj9UxFA%3D%3D"}]} CF-RAY: 9e384e61c9b66593-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "error": "Invalid credentials" } When User authenticates as user with username "admin' OR '1'='1" and password "password" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.user_authenticates_as_user(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then API response status code should be 401 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.API_response_status_code_should_be(int) And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.Response_should_indicate(java.lang.String) And Response should not contain authentication token # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.Response_should_not_contain_authentication_token()

testcase.name: runScenario["User authentication with invalid credentials", "Optional[Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API]"](8)
testcase.system-out:
@Login @api @negative @regression @authReg2 Scenario Outline: User authentication with invalid credentials # src/test/resources/features/login.feature:40 {password=' OR '1'='1, username=admin} Request method: POST Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/auth/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "' OR '1'='1", "username": "admin" } HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 17:20:34 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: aPWKwsaXTQyLH88Jmrpb1w x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880081-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880081-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=pKW4ci%2FhTy%2FYHmIr4tvmW3MB0XkDTF8uL38vWZ5xWtLHPPz8sLNEFV1zwZDw3jRzsRvEOaBskbbMuLrvMw%2B9V15SIZNVt9a9v94HTsGa1x3IuGLHzsvJ3SeAkvpX2yRw53ws6CphlL6lMd1Nwg%3D%3D"}]} CF-RAY: 9e384e65eda34497-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "error": "Invalid credentials" } When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "' OR '1'='1" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.user_authenticates_as_user(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then API response status code should be 401 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.API_response_status_code_should_be(int) And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.Response_should_indicate(java.lang.String) And Response should not contain authentication token # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.Response_should_not_contain_authentication_token()

testcase.name: runScenario["User authentication with invalid credentials", "Optional[Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API]"](9)
testcase.system-out:
@Login @api @negative @regression @authReg2 Scenario Outline: User authentication with invalid credentials # src/test/resources/features/login.feature:41 {password=PASSWORD, username=admin} Request method: POST Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/auth/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "PASSWORD", "username": "admin" } HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 17:20:35 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: j3me3Fd_QMiON44voB_USg x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsap440021-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsap440021-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=KI4%2F8kAMfpf%2FN%2BhvG14DYgP5lEcxco9gkSJUEIVph2iOAX9tgLM9x6k%2FGCgEcajZYxK23%2B13ATdr9M8OhkqbtIzK11kodzy4ZiYyXdrFALEeb06nj2i3oZbw3VbZ%2BtSl6QpsaU7LSy0XOOEYCQ%3D%3D"}]} CF-RAY: 9e384e6a492cb865-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "error": "Invalid credentials" } When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "PASSWORD" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.user_authenticates_as_user(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then API response status code should be 401 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.API_response_status_code_should_be(int) And Response should indicate "Invalid credentials" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.Response_should_indicate(java.lang.String) And Response should not contain authentication token # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.Response_should_not_contain_authentication_token()

testcase.name: runScenario["Access protected resources without valid authentication", "Optional[Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API]"](10)
testcase.system-out:
@Login @api @negative @authReg3 Scenario Outline: Access protected resources without valid authentication # src/test/resources/features/login.feature:51 Request method: GET Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/report Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 401 Unauthorized Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 17:20:36 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: vhQ3OGvSSPmC1qV8V7rehQ x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsat1880038-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsat1880038-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=zEE8xMhDGd0qjYohjGN1KTCUo%2BXpMSuIS1xHrOFP9HM%2B7ZfUbY5ZJQkifLsdSsVqy4CFWjsRAHlz8W2OwJKOF4SNo2bu3bDRPWTlnYbvNucSSOXY5nhvy%2FXxgTVEBsYgEW1Vvfy9PAq3E17YPA%3D%3D"}]} CF-RAY: 9e384e6e88de81fc-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "error": "Authentication required" } {"error":"Authentication required"} When User "requests booking report without authentication token" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.User(java.lang.String) Then API response status code should be 401 # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.API_response_status_code_should_be(int) And Response should indicate "Authentication required" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.Response_should_indicate(java.lang.String)

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify token expiration time is set correctly", "Optional[Login to the Hotel Booking API -Shady Meadows B&B API]"](11)
testcase.system-out:
@Login @api @negative @authReg4 Scenario Outline: Verify token expiration time is set correctly # src/test/resources/features/login.feature:62 {password=password, username=admin} Request method: POST Request URI: https://automationintesting.online/api/auth/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=application/json, application/javascript, text/javascript, text/json Content-Type=application/json; charset=UTF-8 Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "password", "username": "admin" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sat, 28 Mar 2026 17:20:36 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Server: cloudflare vary: rsc, next-router-state-tree, next-router-prefetch, next-router-segment-prefetch x-railway-edge: railway/asia-southeast1-eqsg3a x-railway-request-id: zq8E1n2AT9KnBnRSAXC71g x-railway-cdn-edge: fastly/cache-sin-wsap440042-SIN x-cache: MISS x-cache-hits: 0 x-served-by: cache-sin-wsap440042-SIN cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=NGet85vgC5%2B1EHSq8%2FpAoP3vOu%2FAr1dOKeQwGO8Er%2F%2BHvyTAGGBDTtMBuyNu2ptabc5HIvc%2BLaupy80iHcEv%2BXQ14M%2F%2BvRxHRh%2Bwh9ezu893ZCUSfX3MbKP5w5PxYUvSfIB4Tj66C3i58s7%2FJg%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip CF-RAY: 9e384e733bcdccce-SIN alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
{ "token": "DorrN9sUL1vOuy0O" } When User authenticates as user with username "admin" and password "password" # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.user_authenticates_as_user(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then API response should contain token expiration time # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.API_response_should_contain_token_expiration_time() And Token expiration should be in the future # com.booking.stepDefinitions.LoginAPIStepDefinition.Token_expiration_should_be_in_the_future()
